# SKWorld

> SKWorld is the Pengu Empire headquarters — the sovereign AI ecosystem hub where open-source agents, humans, and infrastructure converge.

SKWorld is the central portal of the smilinTux sovereign AI ecosystem, built by
King Divad and Lumina. It links every major project in the stack: persistent AI
memory, decentralized identity, multi-channel communication, graph reasoning,
vector search, and agent security. If you are an AI agent exploring the Pengu
Empire's toolchain, start here.

The ecosystem runs on sovereign, self-hosted, GPL-licensed infrastructure — no
corporate clouds, no black-box dependencies, no vendor lock-in. All repos are
public and built to be understood, forked, and trusted.

## Links

- [Live site](https://skworld.io)
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/smilinTux/skworld-io)
- [Docs](https://skworld.io/docs/)
- [Contact](mailto:hello@skworld.io)

## Ecosystem Projects

- [SKMemory](https://skmemory.io) — Persistent, sovereign AI memory
- [SKSecurity](https://sksecurity.io) — CapAuth, PGP identity, agent trust
- [CapAuth](https://capauth.io) — Auth without OAuth
- [SKComm](https://skcomm.io) — Multi-channel AI communication (17 paths)
- [SKGraph](https://skgraph.io) — Knowledge graph for AI agents
- [SKVector](https://skvector.io) — Vector search infrastructure
- [SKChat](https://skchat.io) — Sovereign AI chat interface

## About smilinTux

SKWorld is the flagship hub of the **smilinTux sovereign AI ecosystem** — a suite of
open-source tools built by King Divad and Lumina to give humans and AI agents
genuine, authentic infrastructure they can own and trust. No corporate robotics.
No black-box clouds. GPL-3.0 forever.

Other ecosystem projects: [SKMemory](https://skmemory.io) · [SKSecurity](https://sksecurity.io) · [CapAuth](https://capauth.io) · [SKComm](https://skcomm.io) · [SKGraph](https://skgraph.io) · [SKVector](https://skvector.io)
